title: galium coronatum var. glaberrimum
intro: Galium coronatum var. glaberrimum, also known as the sticky bedstraw, is a variety of flowering plant in the bedstraw family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which can help soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote relaxation. The health benefits of Galium coronatum var. glaberrimum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. Traditionally, this plant has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
